engage.name: Like, Comment, Subscribe
templates: If you want to learn more about {topic} drop a like below so it tells me I should create more content like this
Do {action} and when you do drop a comment telling me how it went... I reply to every comment
That's it for today's video, if you want to learn more drop a sub so you don't miss out
Comment '{keyword}' below and I'll send you {resource}

redirect.name: Directing to Another Video
redirect.goal: Increase session time and channel views
templates: If you enjoyed this video then I'm sure you'll love this video on {topic} on the screen. Click here to watch
Now that you know {thing}, watch this next video where I show you {next_thing}
Part 2 is even better — click here

link.name: Link in Description
templates: If that was helpful I'm sure you'd love this new training video I made explaining {topic} and how it can help you {benefit}. Link in the description below
I put together a free {resource} that covers everything we talked about — link in the description
Want the full breakdown? I made a detailed guide — grab it free, link below

manychat.name: ManyChat / Comment Trigger
manychat.goal: Automated DM delivery via comment keyword
templates: Comment '{keyword}' and I'll send you {resource} directly
Type '{keyword}' in the comments and I'll DM you the {resource}

structure.description: Every CTA should follow this 5-part structure

parts.name: Clear step
parts.description: Spell out exactly what to do
